common.name: Name
common.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.subtitle: Move money between your accounts without recording an expense.
transfer.error: Could not save the transfer. Please try again.

accountsPage.title: Accounts
accountsPage.description: Review the accounts available in this space.

trialBalancePage.title: Trial balance
trialBalancePage.description: Review the debit and credit balances for every account in this space.

accountLedgerPage.title: Account ledger
accountLedgerPage.description: Review the posted lines and running balance for this account.
accountLedgerPage.empty: No posted lines found for this account.

balanceSheetPage.title: Balance sheet
balanceSheetPage.description: Review the assets, liabilities, and equity in this space.

incomeStatementPage.title: Income statement
incomeStatementPage.description: Review income and expenses for this space.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.description: A server-computed view of the key figures in this space.
dashboardPage.empty: No posted activity yet. Your overview will appear here after the first entry.

journalEntry.title: New journal entry
journalEntry.description: Record a balanced entry in this space.

validation.lines: At least two lines are required.
validation.currency: Select an account with a valid currency.
validation.currency_policy.currency_not_allowed: This currency is not allowed for the account.
validation.entryUnbalanced: The entry must balance to zero.

empty.title: Help is not set up for this page yet
empty.summary: This help system now covers the main workflow areas, but a few secondary routes still need page-specific guidance.
empty.body: Use Get Started for setup guidance, or return here from the dashboard, journal entries, or accounts pages to see contextual help.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.body: Use the main navigation to move between setup, daily work, dashboards, and administration.

spaceSwitcher.title: Current space
spaceSwitcher.body: This shows which accounting space you are in. If you manage multiple spaces, switch here before entering data.

profile.title: Profile and access
profile.body: Open your profile menu to sign in, sign out, and manage space-level actions that depend on your access.

helpButton.title: Help entry point
helpButton.body: Open Help at any time to get page-specific guidance and available tours without leaving your current workflow.

header.title: Journal workbench
header.body: This page is the operational center for manual postings, review, and adjustment entries.

import.title: Import options
import.body: Use import when entries already exist in another source or when you want to trigger a flow instead of typing them one by one.

newEntry.title: Create a new entry
newEntry.body: Use new entry for one-off postings, corrections, and transactions that need immediate review before posting.

header.title: Chart of accounts
header.body: Manage the accounts that will receive transaction lines and drive your reporting structure.

import.title: Bring in accounts
import.body: Import is useful when you already have a chart of accounts from an external system or template.

newAccount.title: Create an account
newAccount.body: Add a new account when you need a distinct balance or activity bucket that should appear separately in reporting.

header.title: Account groups
header.body: Groups define the higher-level reporting buckets that individual accounts roll up into.

import.title: Import groups
import.body: Use import or export to standardize your group structure before you scale account creation.

header.title: Currencies
header.body: Set up the currencies your space can use before posting transactions that depend on them.

add.title: Add a currency
add.body: Enable another currency here when you need it for accounts, counterparties, or transaction entry.

header.title: Projects
header.body: Projects help you tag and analyze work, costs, and revenues beyond the chart of accounts alone.

import.title: Import projects
import.body: Import is useful when project codes already exist in your operational systems and should stay aligned here.

header.title: OCR intake
header.body: Upload invoices or receipts here, review extracted fields, and turn them into properly reviewed accounting records.

addFiles.title: Add source documents
addFiles.body: Start by adding files or using the camera, then review the extracted result before creating or linking a transaction.

header.title: Users and access
header.body: Manage who can work in the space and how long their access assignments should remain valid.

newUser.title: Invite or add a user
newUser.body: Add a user when collaboration changes, but review roles and validity dates so access matches responsibility.

header.title: Setup checklist
header.body: Use this page to complete the core setup work in a sensible order before relying on daily workflows and reporting.

header.title: Ledger analysis
header.body: This dashboard helps you filter and explain posted activity without editing any underlying transactions.

clear.title: Reset the analysis
clear.body: Clear filters when you want to return to a broader view and rebuild the analysis one condition at a time.

header.title: Partner master data
header.body: Manage your customer and vendor records here so transactions and document workflows can stay tied to consistent counterparties.

newPartner.title: Add a partner
newPartner.body: Create a new partner when reporting, document review, or future transactions should refer to a distinct external party.

header.title: Supporting files
header.body: Use this area for receipts, invoices, and other files that support accounting work or need to be linked later.

upload.title: Upload a file
upload.body: Add a document here when it should be available for later viewing, matching, or transaction support.

header.title: Permission roles
header.body: Roles define reusable permission sets. Changes here can affect access for multiple users at once.

addRole.title: Create a role
addRole.body: Add a role when you need a permission set that should be reusable across several collaborators.

header.title: Budget plans
header.body: Use this page to compare targets and actuals without changing the posted accounting records.

newPlan.title: Create a plan
newPlan.body: Create a new budget plan when you need a new year, scenario, or planning cadence to compare against actual activity.

header.title: Import history
header.body: Review completed imports here when you need traceability, troubleshooting, or confirmation of what a rule or flow produced.

dashboardOverview.title: Dashboard overview
dashboardOverview.summary: Use the dashboard to spot trends quickly before you drill into detailed journal activity.

whatYouSee.heading: What you see here
whatYouSee.body: The dashboard is a read-first area. It summarizes what already exists in your books so you can detect missing data, unusual movements, and areas that need deeper review.
bullets: Overview widgets show high-level financial signals.
Other dashboard tabs let you drill into ledger, cash flow, partners, and projects.
If a view looks empty, the underlying master data or journal entries may still need setup.

howToUseIt.heading: How to use it
howToUseIt.body: Start here to review the current state of the books, then move into ledger or setup pages to investigate or complete missing information.

journalEntries.title: Journal entries
journalEntries.summary: This is where accounting events are recorded and reviewed. Accurate entries here drive reporting everywhere else.

whatThisPageDoes.heading: What this page does
whatThisPageDoes.body: Journal entries are the core accounting records in the system. Each entry should describe a business event and connect the affected accounts through balanced lines.
bullets: Use entries to record day-to-day transactions and adjustments.
Imports and OCR-assisted flows eventually feed into journal data.
Downstream dashboards and reports only reflect what is posted here.

firstSteps.heading: Good first steps
firstSteps.body: Before posting many entries, make sure your currencies, account groups, and accounts are in place so entries can be classified consistently.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.summary: Set up and maintain your chart of accounts so postings classify correctly and reporting stays reliable.

whatBelongsHere.heading: Start here
whatBelongsHere.body: Set account groups and currencies first. Then create accounts manually or import from the template so your chart stays consistent from day one.
bullets: Use one account per reporting purpose and keep account codes unique.
Use the import template, upload, review warnings, then commit.
Fix error rows before import to avoid cleanup afterwards.

beforeYouCreate.heading: Import rules by space type
beforeYouCreate.body: Business spaces: isActive, owner, and owners are ignored; FX columns apply only when explicitly provided. Personal spaces: isActive, owner, and owners are supported; FX policy columns are ignored. In owners, shares can be entered as 60, 60%, or 0.6. Quick format guide: booleans accept TRUE/FALSE/1/0/YES/NO, dates should be YYYY-MM-DD, and currencies should use ISO codes like CHF, EUR, or USD.

accountGroups.title: Account groups
accountGroups.summary: Account groups shape how accounts roll up into reporting sections, cash flow mapping, and analysis views.

whyGroupsMatter.heading: Why groups matter
whyGroupsMatter.body: Groups keep the chart organized. They let similar accounts behave consistently in reports and reduce manual classification work later.

setupOrder.heading: Recommended setup order
setupOrder.body: Define or import groups first, then create accounts inside them. That sequence avoids rework when balances and mappings already depend on a stable structure.

currencies.title: Currencies
currencies.summary: Currencies determine which monetary values can be used in the space and how postings stay consistent across accounts and documents.

baseCurrency.heading: Base and enabled currencies
baseCurrency.body: Start from the main operating currency of the space, then enable only the additional currencies you actually need for accounting activity.

beforePosting.heading: Set this up before posting
beforePosting.body: Review currencies before transactions arrive. Changing currency support after accounts or documents are already active is harder to control.

projects.title: Projects
projects.summary: Projects let you analyze work, profitability, and spending in a way that cuts across accounts and counterparties.

whenToUseProjects.heading: When to use projects
whenToUseProjects.body: Use projects when you need a stable code for jobs, mandates, initiatives, or internal workstreams that should be visible in reporting.

statusDiscipline.heading: Status discipline
statusDiscipline.body: Keep project status current. Active, on-hold, completed, and cancelled states make filtering and downstream review more trustworthy.

ocr.title: Document scan and OCR
ocr.summary: OCR helps you extract draft accounting data from receipts and invoices, but the extracted result still needs accounting review.

whatOcrDoes.heading: What OCR does well
whatOcrDoes.body: It speeds up document intake by reading dates, amounts, counterparties, and other fields so you start from a draft instead of a blank form.

reviewBeforeSave.heading: Review before saving
reviewBeforeSave.body: Treat extracted data as a suggestion. Check taxes, account mapping, dates, currency, and attachments before creating or linking accounting records.

adminSystem.title: System administration
adminSystem.summary: This area contains general app settings, user preferences, language, date/number formats, and other configuration options.

whatBelongsHere.heading: What belongs here
whatBelongsHere.body: Use this page for system-level configuration, backup routines, OCR settings, and advanced storage or sync administration.

sharedSpaceWarning.heading: Be careful in shared spaces
sharedSpaceWarning.body: Some actions here affect every collaborator in the active space. Review the current space and storage mode before changing or deleting anything.

adminSpace.title: Space administration
adminSpace.summary: Manage basic information about this accounting space.

users.title: Users
users.summary: User management controls who can access the accounting space and how long their role assignments remain valid.

whoShouldBeHere.heading: Who should be listed here
whoShouldBeHere.body: Add users who need operational or review access to the active space. Keep the list aligned with real responsibilities, not just convenience.

roleValidity.heading: Role validity
roleValidity.body: Use validity dates when access should start or end on a known schedule. That makes temporary collaboration easier to control and audit.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.placeholder: This dashboard view is ready for content.

pivot.title: Pivot
pivot.description: Build your own view: choose rows, columns, measures and filters to pivot your ledger like a spreadsheet.
pivot.noData: No data matches the current layout. Adjust rows, columns, or filters.

drill.title: {{row}} × {{column}}
drill.empty: No ledger lines for this cell.

overview.subtitle: Financial snapshot for {{year}}
overview.noData: No transactions yet. Your overview will appear once journal entries are posted.

budget.title: Budget vs Actual {{year}}
budget.ytdNote: Grey line = {{pct}}% of budget year elapsed

ledger.description: Filter journal activity by account, account group, date range, owner, and attribution.
ledger.noEntries: No journal entries match these filters.
ledger.drillPointHint: Click a highlighted point to drill into a selected period.

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow Statement
cashFlow.description: Review cash movement by operating, investing, and financing activity over a selected period.
cashFlow.noEntries: No cash flow activity matches this period.
cashFlow.printHint: Print view keeps the statement and summary, and hides interactive controls.

projects.description: Select a project to view its transactions and cash flow.
projects.noProjectSelected: Select a project above to see its overview.
projects.noTransactions: No journal entries are assigned to this project.

businessPartners.description: Select a business partner to view its transactions and cash flow.
businessPartners.noBusinessPartnerSelected: Select a business partner above to see its overview.
businessPartners.noTransactions: No journal entries are assigned to this business partner.

accounts.title: Chart of Accounts
accounts.noAccountsHint: Create your first account to get started.

starterAccountsPrompt.title: Add starter accounts?
starterAccountsPrompt.body: We can create a minimal chart of accounts for you now, or you can start from scratch and add accounts manually.

form.name: Name

form.codeNumericError: Account code must be numeric for the selected group.

import.toggleHint: Toggle rows to include or skip them. For updates you can choose which existing account to merge into.

fxPolicy.noAccountsHint: Add accounts in the Accounts tab first.

cashFlowPolicy.noAccountsHint: Add accounts in the Accounts tab first.

investmentPolicy.description: Assign an investment role to accounts used in investment tracking. Row changes are saved immediately.
investmentPolicy.noAccountsHint: Add accounts in the Accounts tab first.

businessPartners.searchPlaceholder: Search by partner or suggested account…

form.name: Name

accountGroups.title: Account Groups
accountGroups.description: Manage the sub-categories available within each account type. Optionally set a {{validFrom}} / {{validTo}} range to make a group available only during a specific period — useful for seasonal categories or fiscal-year restructuring. Groups without dates are always available.

currencies.importBaseNotChanged: Base currency not changed — a base is already set.

importPreview.noValidRows: No valid rows to import. Invalid: {{invalid}}, duplicates: {{duplicates}}, already enabled: {{alreadyEnabled}}.

currencies.firstCurrencyHint: The first currency added becomes the base (functional) currency.
currencies.cannotRemoveBase: Cannot remove the base currency. Set another currency as base first.
currencies.exchangeRateNote: Exchange rates will be sourced from
currencies.noCurrencies: No currencies configured yet. Click ➕ to add your first currency.

form.invLotWillBeCreated: A lot will be linked on save.
form.invLotSaveWarning: Transaction saved. The investment lot could not be linked — please add it manually in the Investments subledger.
form.vatGrossHint: Apply the VAT code only to the gross amount line (expense or revenue). Do not apply it to the offsetting cash or asset line.
form.headerVatCodeHint: Automatically applied to expense and income lines. Cash, bank, and asset lines are not affected.
form.noAttribution: No attribution — click "+Add" or fill in counterpart account ownerships to auto-derive.
form.fxHintSaved: FX rate applied at posting time.
form.fxHintNew: Rate will be fetched automatically on save, or enter a custom rate above.

accruals.title: Generate accrual entries
accruals.modePrepaid: Prepaid expense amortization (expense vs prepaid asset)
accruals.copyAttribution: Copy current attribution to generated expense lines
accruals.includeInitialPrepaid: Include initial prepaid booking (prepaid expense vs credit account)
accruals.initialPrepaidOnlyInPrepaidMode: Switch mode to "Prepaid expense amortization" to enable this option.
accruals.previewHint: Review and adjust generated periods before posting.

error.accounts: Select both source and counter accounts.
error.sourceType: Source account must be of type: {{type}}.
error.counterType: Counter account must be of type: {{type}}.
error.initialCreditDistinct: Initial credit account must differ from the prepaid asset account.
error.attributionMissing: No attribution available to copy for generated expense lines.
error.attributionInvalid: Attribution shares must sum to 100% before posting accruals.

importModal.noRules: No import rules defined yet. Go to Settings → Import Rules to create one.
importModal.bankNotDetected: Account not detected — set per row.

importModal.noDataRows: No data rows found. Check the "Skip rows" setting in the rule.

flowModal.transferSuggestionsHint: — rows that may represent the same internal transfer
flowModal.linkTransferTip: Set outflow counter-account to the inflow bank account, and exclude the inflow row

previewTable.autoHidden_other: 🤖 {{count}} rows auto-hidden as transfer counterparts. Click Unlink on the matching outflow row to restore.

previewTable.bulkFieldLabel: What column would you like to change?
previewTable.excludeHint: Uncheck rows to exclude them from booking.

budget.title: Budget
budget.description: Define income, expense, and profit/loss budgets by account type, account group, and account.

messages.planSelectFirst: Create or select a budget plan first.
messages.targetOverlap: Overlapping budget target detected. Adjust account, group, or type.

importPreview.title: Review project import
importPreview.noValidRows: No valid rows to import. Invalid rows: {{invalid}}.

projects.confirmDelete: Delete this project? Transactions assigned to it will be unaffected but will lose the project reference.

adminSpace.title: Space
adminSpace.name: Space name
adminSpace.descriptionHint: A short description visible to members. Max 500 characters.
adminSpace.iconNotAvailable: Icon upload is only available for cloud-synced spaces.
adminSpace.localOnlyHint: Changes will be saved to the cloud once this space is connected to a remote.

fiscalYear.title: Fiscal Year
fiscalYear.hint: Used when generating accounting and VAT periods for this space. Changing these settings does not alter already-generated periods.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.hint: These settings apply to all members of this space and cannot be overridden by individual users.
preferences.formatAndAppearanceHint: Controls how dates, numbers, and accent color appear for the whole space.

businessInfo.title: Business Information
businessInfo.hint: Legal and registration details for this business space.

upgradeModal.title: Multi-user account is ready
upgradeModal.body: This space now supports team collaboration. You can invite additional people and manage access by role.
upgradeModal.itemInvite: Invite colleagues to this space from the Users tab.
upgradeModal.itemRoles: Assign the right permissions for each person with roles.

adminPeriod.title: Accounting Periods
adminPeriod.noPeriodsYet: No periods for {{year}}. Click "Generate" to create them.
adminPeriod.noVatPeriodsYet: No VAT periods for {{year}}. Click "Generate" to create them.
adminPeriod.businessOnly: Period management is available for business spaces only.

users.title: Users
users.confirmDelete: Delete this user? Transactions will keep their attribution data.

form.duplicateEmail: This email is already assigned to another user.
form.noShareHint: No shared cloud workspace connected. The user will be added locally but cannot receive an automated invitation.
form.shareError: User added, but cloud sharing failed: {{error}}
form.membershipProvisionFailed: The user was saved, but cloud access could not be granted. Make sure you are online and a space admin, then save again.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.noAttachments: No attachments yet. Upload a receipt or document.
attachments.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is not available in this browser context.
attachments.copyDiagnosticsFailed: Could not copy diagnostics to clipboard.

designGallery.modalBody: This modal demonstrates the shared dialog treatment.
designGallery.label: Label

auth.title: Sign in to unlock all features
auth.subtitle: Connect your Microsoft account to sync your data across devices.
auth.notSignedIn: Not signed in. Sign in to enable cloud sync.

feature.onedrive: Sync data across devices via cloud sync
feature.multiDevice: Access your books from any device

rolesPage.title: Roles
rolesPage.subtitle: Roles are rows, navigation rights are columns. Toggle access per role.
rolesPage.deleteBlockedAssigned: Reassign users before deleting this role

error.preventAdminLockout: You cannot remove the last Admin area right from your current role.

periodClose.title: Year-End Close
periodClose.description: Formalize the end of an accounting period and transfer results to retained earnings.
periodClose.confirm: Are you sure you want to close period {{year}}? This will create a closing journal entry and transfer the result to retained earnings.
periodClose.summaryHint: This closing will transfer the current-year earnings to retained earnings and reset the income/expense accounts for the next period.

info.title: Info
info.privacyDesc: How your data is stored, synced, and protected.
info.termsDesc: Usage terms, disclaimers, and your responsibilities.

language.title: Language
language.hint: Choose the display language for the app.

dateFormat.title: Date Format
dateFormat.hint: Choose how dates are displayed throughout the app.
dateFormat.browserNote: Note: date picker fields in forms always use the browser/OS locale and may not reflect this setting.

numberFormat.title: Number Format
numberFormat.hint: Choose how numbers and amounts are displayed throughout the app.

fxRates.title: FX Rate Source
fxRates.hint: Choose how exchange rates are sourced for FX revaluation and settlement adjustments.
fxRates.policyLiveFirst: Live lookup first, then cache fallback
fxRates.businessHint: Used for business-space period-end revaluation and realized FX settlement adjustments.
fxRates.personalHint: Personal spaces keep a simplified FX flow; this is stored per space for advanced FX features.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.hint: Choose a cloud provider to back up and sync your data across devices.
cloudSync.signInRequired: Please sign in with your Microsoft account to sync your data.

conflict.title: Sync conflicts
conflict.subtitle: Some of your changes conflict with updates from another device or user. Choose which version to keep.
conflict.subtitleWithValidation: Some of your changes violate business rules or conflict with updates from other users. Fix or resolve them to continue.

validationErrors.title: Business Rule Violations
validationErrors.hint: Edit this item to fix the validation error.
validationErrors.accountCodeHint: Go back to the account form and change the account code to a unique value.

sharedSetup.title: Shared Space Setup
sharedSetup.subtitle: This space is collaborative. Connect shared cloud storage before syncing.
sharedSetup.label: Shared Library

status.noCandidates: Click "Create Shared Library" to set up sharing. For work accounts, you will create a SharePoint library. For personal accounts, a shared folder will be auto-created.
status.personalHint: Click "Create Shared Library" to auto-setup shared cloud storage for your personal account.
status.folderConnected: Shared folder created and connected. Multi-user sync is now ready.
status.openedSharePoint: SharePoint opened in a new tab. Create a document library, then come back and click "Connect Shared Library".
status.connected: Shared library connected. Multi-user sync is now ready.
status.disconnected: Shared library disconnected. Select a library to reconnect.

sharingHealth.title: Sharing Health Check
sharingHealth.hint: Verify that all users with an email address have been granted access to shared cloud storage.
sharingHealth.noUsers: No local users with an email address found.

backup.title: Backup
backup.hint: Select a folder where the app will save full JSON backups of all your data.
backup.restoreConfirm: This will replace current data with the selected backup. Continue?
backup.restoreNotSupported: Your browser does not support file picker restore.
backup.noFolder: No backup folder selected. Please choose a folder first.
backup.notSupported: Your browser does not support folder selection. Please use a modern Chromium-based browser.
backup.permissionDenied: Write permission was denied for the selected folder.

data.title: Data Management
data.confirmClearWarning1: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the current space and its data. This action cannot be undone.
data.confirmClearWarning2: Please confirm again: This will permanently delete the current space you have open. Are you absolutely certain?

theme.title: Theme
theme.accentHint: Choose the main color used by buttons and highlights.

ocr.title: OCR / Scan Settings
ocr.hint: Configure the AI engine used to extract data from scanned receipts and invoices. If no API key is set, Tesseract.js runs entirely in your browser (free, offline).
ocr.apiKeyHint: Uses GPT-4o-mini Vision for superior accuracy (~$0.0002 per document). Leave blank to use Tesseract.js.

importRules.title: Import Rules
importRules.description: Define how Excel / CSV bank statements are mapped to journal entries.
importRules.noRules: No import rules yet. Click + to create one.
importRules.noRulesHint: Rules automatically categorise transactions when importing bank statements.

picker.title: New Import Rule
picker.subtitle: What kind of file will this rule import?
picker.bankDesc: Each row is one transaction side (credit or debit). The counter account is filled in manually or via automation rules.
picker.fullDesc: Each row encodes a complete entry with explicit debit and credit accounts — no manual matching needed.
picker.splitDesc: Each row is one journal line; rows sharing the same reference are combined into one transaction.

modal.bankIban: Detect from IBAN in file preamble
modal.ibanHint: Specify where the IBAN appears in the preamble rows (0-based indices). Example for the UBS CSV: row 1, column 1 (second field of the second row).
modal.ibanColumnHint: Enter the column header whose value will be matched against account IBANs on each data row. Useful for statements that include multiple accounts or cards in a single file (e.g. a "Kontonummer" column).
modal.colMappingsDesc: Enter the exact column header name from your file. Multiple Description mappings are concatenated with " | ".
modal.errAmountMapping: Either an Amount column or both Debit column + Credit column are required.
modal.errAmountConflict: Cannot combine Amount (single) with Debit/Credit columns — use one approach.
modal.errEmptyColumns: All column names must be filled in.
modal.errBankAccount: Select a bank account or switch to IBAN detection.
modal.errIbanColumn: Enter the column header used for account detection.
modal.entryModeFull: Full journal entry (DR + CR per row)
modal.currencyColHint: Currency will be read from the mapped column for each row. Set a fallback below for rows where the column is empty.
modal.defaultCurrencyHint: ISO 4217 code, e.g. CHF or EUR
modal.errDebitAccountMapping: A Debit account column mapping is required in full journal-entry mode.
modal.errCreditAccountMapping: A Credit account column mapping is required in full journal-entry mode.
modal.errAccountMapping: An Account column mapping is required in split multi-line mode.

importFlows.title: Import Flows
importFlows.description: Define reusable multi-step import sequences. Run them from the Journal Entries page.
importFlows.noFlows: No import flows yet. Click + to create one.
importFlows.noFlowsHint: Flows chain multiple rules into a reusable pipeline.

modal.previewDesc: show a review table per step and require confirmation before transactions are created.
modal.noSteps: No steps yet. Click “Add Step” to define a source.
modal.fsaNotSupported: File System Access API is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge.
modal.errStepSource: Step {{n}}: pick a source file or folder.

automation.title: Automation Rules
automation.description: Rules applied automatically during import to link transfers and assign counter accounts.
automation.suggestionsDesc: Patterns learned from past entries where the same description was consistently assigned to the same account (3+ times).
automation.noRules: No automation rules yet. Click + to create one.
automation.noSuggestions: No patterns detected yet. Import and manually categorise more transactions to see suggestions here.

ocr.title: Scan Documents
ocr.selectDoc: Select a document from the left panel
ocr.actionPrompt: What would you like to do with this document?

dropZone.title: Drop receipts or invoices here
dropZone.subtitle: Supports images (JPEG, PNG, HEIC) and PDF files

form.selectDoc: Select a document to view extracted data

pending.title: Create Pending Journal Entry
pending.description: This will create a pending entry that can be matched once a bank statement is imported.

link.title: Link to Existing Transaction

detail.amountHint: Use comma or dot for decimals (for example 123,45 or 123.45).

sharedSetup.title: Shared Space Setup
sharedSetup.subtitle: Connect this collaborative space to shared storage before inviting users.
sharedSetup.label: Shared Library
sharedSetup.personalIntro: You are signed in with a personal Microsoft account. We will create shared cloud storage for this space.

status.noCandidates: Click "Create Shared Library" to set up sharing. For work accounts, you will create a SharePoint library. For personal accounts, a shared folder will be auto-created.
status.personalHint: Click "Create Shared Library" to auto-setup shared cloud storage for your personal account.
status.folderConnected: Shared folder created and connected. Continue onboarding.
status.openedSharePoint: SharePoint opened in a new tab. Create a document library, then click "Connect Shared Library".
status.signInToContinue: Sign in with Microsoft to set up shared storage.

teamUsers.title: Add team members
teamUsers.subtitle: Add additional users for this space. You can choose whether to prepare invite emails.
teamUsers.invalid: Please enter first name, last name, and a valid email address.

onboardingIntro.title: Set up your space
onboardingIntro.subtitle: Finish the key setup tasks in your own pace.
onboardingIntro.subtitleWithSpace: Finish the key setup tasks for {{name}} in your own pace.
onboardingIntro.successSubtitle: Great work. Taking you to your dashboard...

setupInfo.line: Why do these setup steps come first?
setupInfo.title: Start with foundations to avoid rework later.
setupInfo.body: Currencies, accounts, groups, partners, projects, and user access define how every entry is validated, posted, and reported. Setting them up first keeps imports and daily bookkeeping consistent.

currencies.title: Set currencies
currencies.description: Set your base currency and add any operating currencies you use. This keeps multi-currency postings and reporting conversions consistent.

accountGroups.title: Create account groups (optional)
accountGroups.description: Define account groups to structure your chart of accounts before it grows. This keeps account classification and reporting clean.
accountGroups.personalDescription: Review the suggested account groups and adjust only if needed before creating accounts.

accounts.title: Create accounts
accounts.description: Add your core chart of accounts (assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses) and ownership defaults. These accounts drive every journal posting and report.

businessPartners.title: Add business partners
businessPartners.description: Add your recurring customers and suppliers. This lets you link transactions to the right counterparty from day one.

projects.title: Create projects
projects.description: Create the projects you want to track in planning and reporting. Use them to allocate revenue and costs by initiative.

users.title: Add users
users.description: Invite teammates and assign the right role for each person. Start with least-privilege access and expand only when needed.

vat.title: Set up VAT codes
vat.description: Add your VAT codes (e.g. standard rate, reduced rate, exempt). This lets you classify VAT on transactions and generate filing-ready VAT periods.

spaceInfo.title: Set up business data
spaceInfo.description: Enter your company's legal form, UID number, and registered address in Admin → Space. This data is used for reporting and legal document generation.

openingBalances.title: Enter opening balances
openingBalances.description: Enter the current balance of each account. This creates the opening journal entry so your reports start from the correct position. You can skip and add them later.

fx.noForeignCurrencies: No foreign currencies are configured for this space. Add currencies in Master data → Accounts → Currencies.

chart.title: Exchange rate: {{quote}} → {{base}}

unmapped.pageBanner: {{count}} GL entries are tagged to investments but not yet mapped to a lot. Open a position to add shares and price to create the lot.
unmapped.sectionHint: These journal entries are tagged to this position but have no lot yet. Add shares and price to create the lot.

lots.title: Acquisition Lots
lots.unlinkedBanner: {{count}} confirmed lot(s) have no linked journal entry — investment value may not appear on the balance sheet.

hint.buy: Post a journal entry for the cost of this lot to the GL asset account.
hint.sell: Post a journal entry for the proceeds of this sale. Realized gain or loss will be calculated automatically.
hint.dividend: Post a journal entry for the dividend payout: gross income credited, net cash and Quellensteuer (withholding tax) debited.

accounts.classDescription: These accounts apply to all {{assetClass}} positions in {{currency}}. Saving updates all matching positions automatically.
accounts.notConfigured: No GL accounts configured yet for {{assetClass}} positions in {{currency}}. Set them up below — they will apply to all current and future positions in this class and currency.
accounts.missingClassOrCurrency: Set an asset class and currency on this position before configuring GL accounts.

autoCreateModal.title: Create GL Accounts — {{assetClass}} · {{currency}}
autoCreateModal.description: The following accounts will be created and linked to all {{assetClass}} positions in {{currency}}.
autoCreateModal.codeNote: Codes shown are the starting suggestion. If a code is already in use, it will be incremented automatically.

overview.drillHint: Click a bar for monthly breakdown

overview.acquisitionPromptHint: This will post a journal entry for the full property value (land + building) to the asset account. Choose the source of funds (bank account, equity injection, etc.).

form.landBuildingSplitNote: Land is not depreciable. The building/land split is required for Swiss tax compliance (Art. 62 DBG).
form.vatOptionNote: Enabling the VAT option makes rental income subject to VAT but allows input tax deduction on building costs.
form.title: Property Name
form.valueSplitNote: Land is not depreciable. The building/land split is required for Swiss tax compliance (Art. 62 DBG).
form.depreciationRateHint: Straight-line: 1.5–2 % (residential), 2–4 % (commercial). Degressive: typically 20 % of carrying value.
form.vatOptionHint: Enabling the VAT option makes rental income subject to VAT but allows input tax deduction on building costs.
form.errorValueRequired: At least one of land value or building value is required.
